title: Agent SDK: Claude Code's agent loop as a library

body.concept: The Claude Agent SDK packages the same agent loop, tools, and context management that power Claude Code into a Python/TypeScript library. You call `query()` with a prompt and options, and get back a streaming async iterator of messages — Claude autonomously reads files, runs commands, edits code, and more, just like it does inside Claude Code.
body.analogy: Think of Claude Code as a fully assembled car you drive from the driver's seat. The Agent SDK is the same engine, transmission, and wheels sold as a crate kit — you bolt them into your own chassis (your application) and control the steering programmatically.
body.visual: Your App → query(prompt, options) → Agent Loop [Read → Think → Edit → Bash → ...] → streamed messages back to your app
